action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
line = \"const 'const' Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/004_const_var_defn.sysu.c:2:1>\"
# Check text extraction
typeEnd = line.find(' ')
textEnd = line.find('\t', typeEnd + 1)
print('typeEnd:', typeEnd)
print('textEnd:', textEnd)
print('textEnd < typeEnd + 3:', textEnd < typeEnd + 3)
"
